title: Melted Middle Eastern Gratin
description: A creamy, cheesy side dish inspired by the flavors of the Middle East. This gratin is perfect for a dinner party or special occasion.

ingredients.name: Eastern spices
ingredients.amount: 2 tsp, mix of cumin, coriander, and paprika

instructions: In a large bowl, toss the cubed flatbread with 1 tbsp olive oil, Eastern spices, and garlic until well coated.
Transfer the flatbread mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix the melted cheese blend with the remaining 1 tbsp olive oil.
Pour the cheese mixture over the flatbread mixture in the baking dish.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
